text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today is Valentine's Day! Usually I'd spend it
working or simply enjoying some downtime, but
this year...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Trainer! The meeting place is this way! Come on!

text_block_list.name: Shift Supervisor
text_block_list.text:
Okay, it's time to get you part-timers all trained
up. First, please take a look at the materials I've
handed out.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I told Ines Fujin that I want to use my free time
this week working the same one-off gigs as her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I figured that if we both work, it would cut the
time we need to spend in half, freeing her up for
more training before our next race, but...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Oh my god! Trainer is being attacked by birds!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It turns out that learning the ropes of a new job
isn't as easy as Ines Fujin makes it seem...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Are you really okay?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
It's great you showed up like a responsible
worker, but sometimes you need the courage to
admit you've bitten off more than you can chew.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
...Okay, okay. First, turn your head this way.
You've got a little bed head going on.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Eventually, I find myself helping out at the venue
of a large event, endlessly wrapping chocolates.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
...Hmm, based on the instructions, wrapping them
like this should be fine, I guess.
choice_data_list: Ines, you're really good at wrapping!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, never underestimate the ultimate
part-timer! This kind of work is child's play!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Speaking of which, about your wrapping
technique...

text_block_list.name: Short-Haired Part-Timer
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! You wrapped those so beautifully! What's
your secret?!

text_block_list.name: Shift Supervisor
text_block_list.text:
Seriously! You've got some real talent! Think you
could help the group over there, too?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Haha, you're sure getting a lot of praise, Trainer!
I'm almost jealous...
choice_data_list: Looks like I'll finally be of help!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Guess so...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: But at this rate, I won't be able to teach you anything...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Hm? You're no match for me in terms of speed,
though!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Come on, let's pick up the pace!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
So we knuckle down in our little corner of the
venue, single-mindedly wrapping chocolate after
chocolate, until...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Good work today!

text_block_list.name: Shift Supervisor
text_block_list.text:
Excellent work, everyone! I've prepared some
gifts as thanks, but make sure you only take one
each.

text_block_list.name: Part Timers
text_block_list.text: Okaaay!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Say, Trainer. Go ahead and grab two—you can
have mine.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
It's fine! Hurry up and get in line for some
chocolates!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
...I mean, this is pretty much the only thing I can
do for you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Acting sulky for some reason, Ines Fujin gives me
a shove, and I go collect my two sets of
chocolate.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
So we knuckle down in our little corner of the
venue, single-mindedly wrapping chocolate after
chocolate, until...

text_block_list.name: Event Coordinator
text_block_list.text:
Boy, we'd sure have been in trouble without your
help! As a thank-you, please take this box of
assorted chocolates!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: ...They really worked you hard today, huh?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Even had you helping out the other staff. You
didn't show a glimpse of your hopeless side.
choice_data_list: Let's share the chocolates I got!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: ...Pft! Hehe, ahaha! Okay, good idea!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I'm sorry, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I kinda got all upset back there. And over
something so silly, too.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Let me buy you a drink to go with those
chocolates. I've gotta treat you once in a while.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
You worked hard today, and this is to
commemorate a job well done! ...Though I can
only spare a hundred yen or so.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ines Fujin returns from the convenience store with
coffee, and we stuff our cheeks with delicious
chocolate.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As we share this pleasant moment, I see a
beaming smile spread across her face.
